data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario of an auto-offer when a cancellation occurs, but the evidence does not confirm this functionality. While the linked use case describes the process of making an offer when a cancellation happens, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the system's behavior in automatically offering a slot to the next person in line. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of the expected outcome.
gaps: No evidence of the automatic offer being made when a slot opens.
